criteria_checked.note: The presence-gated design resolves B1 completely: emission requires ALL THREE companion docs at the scanned root (os.path.isfile, atomic all-or-nothing), so the shipped generator adds nothing on hosts (no dangling references) while the DMC repo — the only place the docs exist — gets the native paragraph and the zero-section-7-hunk byte-identity proof. The new Finding records the full B1 trace (installer ships bin/lib/*; SUPPORT_DOCS lacks the three docs; the m8 dangling scan excludes bin/lib; zero machine tripwire). The negative proof lands as a MODULE-selftest row (doc-less tmp fixture omits the paragraph — the host-shape proof) plus a positive row; this is one of the two lanes the r1 blocker explicitly offered, and it keeps test-agents-md.sh honestly no-edit. Verified live: no test fixture carries any of the three docs, so the fixture suite's generated outputs stay paragraph-free and 24/0 holds without touching the fixture file. Edge case checked: a host coincidentally holding all three files gets pointers that RESOLVE — factually honest, not dangling.

Folded: the plan's Finding now marks all prose-quoted wrap points as non-authoritative, records the od -c facts (committed line 239 ends with 'READ BEFORE any substantial'; line 240 is the closing fragment; no trailing spaces), and mandates the 4-element split be taken from the committed file bytes with the zero-hunk AC as backstop.

Folded: L1g asserts BOTH tracked .codex files; landmarks selftest 11-to-13. Verified live that the current baseline is exactly 11/0, so the arithmetic holds. NOTE one stale sentence survives in the findings layer (plan line 74 still reads 'makes 12'); the binding sections (Proposed Change 2, DMC-T002, the AC) all consistently say 13 — the AC is authoritative and machine-checked.

Folded: the scope-lock drill's landmarks input is generated by the LIVE classifier (dmc landmarks), so the REFUSE proves rule-to-map-to-refusal end-to-end rather than only scope-lock mechanics on a hand-declared class.

Count claims verified against the live tree: agents-md module selftest currently 24/0 (plan claims 24-to-26 with the two new rows; no exact-count assertion exists elsewhere); landmarks currently 11/0 (plan claims 13 with two L1g rows); m65 codex-shims baseline 143/0 from v1.0.2 carried as the no-regression bar.

The r1 II.5 ruling stands unchanged for Rev 2: the schema reword is LAWFUL via this Article III cycle (canonical non-mirror file; registered deferral wording verified at MILESTONES:662; prose-only, validator shape/enum untouched).
